headline: Simple, Transparent Pricing
subheadline: Daily content and live growth direction for every creator

plans.name: Custom
features: For teams, brands, and custom needs

faq.question: Can I switch plans anytime?
faq.answer: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect on your next billing cycle.

faq.question: What is content and live growth direction?
faq.answer: We provide daily recommendations on what to post, when to go live, hook strategies, and why it matters for your growth right now.

faq.question: Do you offer annual billing discounts?
faq.answer: Yes. Contact our sales team for custom Enterprise pricing and annual billing options.

faq.question: Is there a free trial?
faq.answer: Yes. Start with a 7-day free trial to explore content and live direction features—no credit card required.

subtext: Billed in local currency at current exchange rate. All plans include daily content direction, live streaming opportunities, and email support.
